summary: Frontend testing iteration 13 - All 12 test cases PASSED. Verified 3 key fixes: (1) Tonearms fully inside turntable boundary at right-4 top-[8%] with 75px arm, (2) Center mixer widened to 180px with prominent MASTER section including 12-segment VU meters and 32px MASTER/BOOTH knobs, (3) Deck B turntable fully visible (right edge at 1430px, viewport 1920px). All UI elements verified at 1920x800 viewport.
passed_tests: App loads without errors - CYBERDECK header visible
Turntable A position: x=490, y=61, 190x190px - fully visible
Turntable B position: x=1240, y=61, 190x190px - right edge at 1430px (not cut off)
Tonearms fully inside turntable circles (Deck A: insideX=true, insideY=true; Deck B: insideX=true, insideY=true)
DECK A label visible at x=49, y=274 - NOT covered by tonearms
DECK B label visible at x=1083, y=274 - NOT covered by tonearms
Center mixer width=180px, height=525px with prominent MASTER section
MASTER and BOOTH knobs visible and larger (32px) in center mixer
CH1 and CH2 channel strips visible with TRIM/HI/MID/LOW knobs (22px)
Channel faders visible (h-14) for both channels
Colorful pads 1-8 visible on both decks (8 colors: red, orange, yellow, green, cyan, blue, purple, pink)
Colorful sampler buttons (HORN/SIREN/DROP/AIRHORN) visible on both decks
All UI fits without scrolling (body height 800px = viewport height 800px)
Station browser opens on STATIONS button click - RADIO CRATE panel opens
context_for_next_testing_agent: v13 confirms all user fixes: (1) Tonearms now positioned at right-4 top-[8%] with 75px arm, fully inside 190x190 turntable circles, (2) Center mixer widened to 180px with prominent MASTER section - 12-segment VU meters (w-3), MASTER/BOOTH knobs 32px, CH strip knobs 22px, faders h-14, (3) Main content px-6 padding keeps Deck B turntable fully visible at x=1240 (right edge 1430px < 1920px viewport). All 14 test cases pass. Station browser works via RADIO CRATE panel.
console_notes: Minor ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED for external resource - does not affect app functionality
